name: Turtle Cookies/Christmas Cookbook
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
Mix brown sugar, butter or margarine, water, and vanilla. Stir in flour and salt until the dough holds together. If the dough is dry, stir in 1-2 teaspoons of water.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
For each cookie, place 3-5 pecan halves on an ungreased cookie sheet. Shape dough by teaspoonfuls around caramel pieces; press firmly onto the center of each group of nuts.
Bake until set but not brown, about 12-15 minutes. Cool.
Dip tops of cookies into chocolate glaze.
Glaze: Beat powdered sugar, water, melted chocolate, and vanilla together until smooth. If necessary, stir in water, 1 teaspoon at a time, until the frosting reaches the desired consistency.
